The bearing changed from -174 to -145 after TURN_LEFT.
If I turned left (yaw changed from 0 to -30), and the bearing changed from -174 to -145 (an increase of +29 degrees), this confirms the bearing convention:

If I turn left (My_Heading decreases), Bearing increases.
So, -174 = G - 0 => G = -174.
After turning left 30 deg: My_Heading = -30.
